description: Semantic visual routing rules for Mr.Ai. This file maps transferable voiceover intent to layout names. It must not become a pile of named entities from test scripts.

rules.use_for: Inherited material, external influence, old knowledge, or prior assets are transformed into a new expression.
rules.avoid_for: Simple chronological history with no transformation.

rules.use_for: The voiceover rejects a forced binary and opens a third, more useful path.
rules.avoid_for: Normal A/B comparison where one side clearly wins.

rules.use_for: A person, tool, idea, or product is reduced to a convenient external label.
rules.avoid_for: Neutral taxonomy or ordinary naming with no distortion.

rules.use_for: The point is not whether something is used, but how it is transformed by use.
rules.avoid_for: Pure copying, pure consumption, or legal ownership disputes.

rules.use_for: Two origins, roles, positions, or truths can coexist without one erasing the other.
rules.avoid_for: Mathematical merger or simple addition formula.

rules.use_for: The segment names a boundary, failure mode, or safety constraint.
rules.avoid_for: General disagreement with no concrete risk.

rules.use_for: Several tools, agents, or steps must pass work to each other.
rules.avoid_for: Single-tool demos with no chain or handoff.

rules.use_for: The segment explains hidden structure inside a process, role, model, or system.
rules.avoid_for: Simple linear process that is already visible.

rules.use_for: The voiceover corrects a common emotional reaction or misconception.
rules.avoid_for: Pure factual correction with no audience emotion.

rules.use_for: A before/after transformation is the central idea.
rules.avoid_for: Static comparison with no transformation.

rules.use_for: The voiceover weighs claims, choices, or interpretations against evidence.
rules.avoid_for: Personal taste judgment with no evidence layer.

rules.use_for: Two sources, roles, truths, or constraints should remain visible together.
rules.avoid_for: Mathematical addition or three-box equation slides.

rules.use_for: The segment rejects a forced binary and opens a third path.
rules.avoid_for: Normal A/B comparison where one side clearly wins.

rules.use_for: The segment says a label hides the real object, person, or idea.
rules.avoid_for: Neutral category labels.

rules.use_for: A source/tool/influence becomes meaningful only after active transformation.
rules.avoid_for: Pure copying or pure consumption.

rules.use_for: A repeated process has checkpoints, state reads, validation, or stop conditions.
rules.avoid_for: One-time linear steps with no feedback.

rules.use_for: Bad output, bad state, or wrong feedback enters a loop and amplifies.
rules.avoid_for: A single isolated error with no downstream effect.

rules.use_for: The segment asks whether a task is suitable, valuable, recoverable, or verifiable.
rules.avoid_for: A broad principle with no decision criteria.

rules.use_for: The explanation has layers, scopes, or nested responsibilities.
rules.avoid_for: Flat lists with no containment relationship.

rules.use_for: A goal, claim, or output must be accepted only with evidence.
rules.avoid_for: A subjective preference without acceptance criteria.

rules.use_for: Input becomes output through a process that separates signal from noise.
rules.avoid_for: A static comparison or final result only.

rules.use_for: A hidden mechanism must be opened and made explainable.
rules.avoid_for: Simple visible pipeline.
